claim_scope: This file contains local research status records derived from normalized scanner findings, reachability evidence, context enrichment, and scoring artifacts. It is not an official vendor VEX claim.
notes: Records are limited to scanner-backed findings present in normalized artifacts.

risk_score.score_explanation: scanner_native_priority=65.0; reachable=+20.0; runtime_dependency=+10.0; direct_dependency=+8.0; fixed_version_available=+5.0; missing_evidence(scanner_confidence)=-4.0; prioritization score only, not an exploitability claim

records.justification: Local testbed metadata marks this package version as the intended fixed dependency for the case; scanner evidence is retained for review.
limitations: This is a SupplyTrace-VEX project-evidence-based VEX-style status, not an official vendor VEX attestation.
Static reachability analysis can miss dynamic imports, reflection, framework dispatch, and generated code.
Scanner availability, scanner databases, and raw scanner output quality limit the strength of status assignment.
Status records prioritize defensive triage and do not prove exploitability or non-exploitability.
